$comment: Sample individual sovereignty identity record. All values are illustrative placeholders.

_sovereigntyNote.memoryOwnership: All memory generated in AI interactions is owned by this individual unless explicitly transferred.
_sovereigntyNote.agentDelegations: See separate agent-authority records for any agents acting on this individual's behalf.
_sovereigntyNote.dataPortability: This individual retains the right to export all associated memory and data at any time.
